title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing (live, unedited)
summary: CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence is Harvard University's course on AI fundamentals taught by Brian Yu. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with accompanying live video lectures.
writeup: This is the first chapter, on Playing, from CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence, a Harvard University course taught by Brian Yu and presented live and unedited. The session covers foundational AI concepts and sits within a course offered through edX, the Harvard Extension School, and the Harvard Summer School, with community engagement resources available. The material spans topics including AI coding, deep learning, and AI agents.
